If you enjoyed this, please add it to your favourites 
and/or
give a rating to show appreciation for the work that 
went into providing it for you

The song is in two distinct sections, the first part 
(up to 1 minute 45 seconds in this version) being a 
slow
free time ballad and the second (the remaining 3 
minutes, again in this version) a disco classic.
For ease of reading the tab I have labelled the slower 
first section as an [Intro].
While not strictly true it should hopefully make things
 easier to follow - for any of the much longer disco
versions of the song the sections simply repeat.
